project_type: Next.js 16 with TypeScript, App Router, Tailwind CSS 3.4, Framer Motion 11.3
test_framework: No test framework configured - this is a static marketing website
test_command: npm run build (no test suite - build verification only)
verification_instructions: Run npm run build in the project directory to verify all pages compile without errors
environment_constraints: Network available for npm install and fetching external resources. Unsplash URLs configured in next.config.ts for remote images (images.unsplash.com, plus.unsplash.com, source.unsplash.com).
contribution_requirements: Branch premium-redesign is already checked out. All changes go on this branch. Do NOT push.
key_patterns: Components use lucide-react icons, Next.js Image component for optimized images, Tailwind utility classes with custom design tokens (navy-950, gold-500, etc.), custom CSS classes in globals.css (gold-text, shimmer-btn, card-premium, btn-premium, dots-bg, section-pad). Font families: Playfair Display (display/headings) and Inter (body). Color scheme: navy (#0B2E4F) and gold (#D4AF37). Framer Motion available but currently only used implicitly. Components are in src/components/ with page sections in src/components/sections/. Pages use Next.js App Router in src/app/.
directory_structure: src/app/ - pages (page.tsx, about/page.tsx, products/page.tsx, contact/page.tsx, certifications/page.tsx); src/components/ - shared components (Navbar, Footer, ContactForm, ScrollToTop); src/components/sections/ - homepage sections; public/ - static assets (logo.png only); tailwind.config.ts - Tailwind theme with navy/gold colors
